rationale: Request to include server assertion number in exception messages; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule involved.
Feature request for GridFS existence-check method; API convenience improvement, no spec conformance issue.
Internal optimization to reuse pre-connection socket; no spec rule involved.
Feature request to add timezone parameter to ObjectId.generation_time; API ergonomics, not a spec violation.
network_timeout option applied too late due to code ordering bug; internal implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Wire protocol spec defines response flags (CursorNotFound) and query options; driver must handle them correctly per spec.
Connection failure due to changed isMaster response format; compatibility bug, not a spec conformance issue.
Connection pool max size improvement; internal resource management, no spec rule involved.
TypeError when parsing host string without port; internal parsing bug, not a spec-defined behavior violation.
Reference leak (missing Py_DECREF) in C BSON decoder; memory management bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Request to raise TimeoutError instead of OperationFailure for wtimeout; API ergonomics, no specific spec rule violated.
Feature request to list system_js entries; API convenience improvement, no spec involvement.
SO_LINGER socket option improvement; internal network implementation, no spec rule involved.
Port number ignored when connecting; internal connection bug unrelated to any spec requirement.
Auto-reconnection improvement for closed sockets; internal reliability improvement, no spec rule contradicted.
Feature request to add readline() to GridOut for pickle compatibility; API ergonomics, no spec violation.
String formatting bug in exception message when index_list is a tuple; cosmetic/internal bug, no spec rule involved.
Feature request for GridFS get_version method; API addition, no spec conformance issue.
Feature request for GridFS unicode write support; API enhancement, no spec rule violated.
Python-specific cursor slicing behavior; API ergonomics improvement, no MongoDB spec involved.
Connection stays on old primary after stepDown; SDAM-area bug but description is too thin to identify a specific violated spec rule.
DBRef cannot be deepcopied; Python-specific serialization bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Concurrency issue; description too thin to determine spec involvement.
Documentation typo in collection.py error message; cosmetic fix, no spec involvement.
Wrong exception type raised for duplicate key in capped collection; no spec rule specifying DuplicateKeyError vs OperationFailure in this case.
Segfault in C BSON encoder when given dict subclass with mismatched keys; memory safety bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Feature request for toList() method referencing Java driver; API convenience, not a spec conformance issue.
Description empty; insufficient detail to classify.
map_reduce 'out' parameter required by newer server version; API compatibility issue, no driver spec rule violated.
Connection repr broken (shows None) when slave_okay=True; cosmetic/internal bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Connection string spec requires case-insensitive option parsing; driver rejects 'slaveOk' but accepts 'slaveok'.
Request to add mocking library to test suite; test tooling improvement, no spec involvement.
Request to include document size in too-large error message; error message ergonomics, no spec rule violated.
Driver didn't respect server's reported maxBsonObjectSize of 16MB; internal hardcoded limit, no spec rule directly at issue.
as_class applied recursively to subdocuments unexpectedly; Python-specific API behavior, no spec rule contradicted.
pymongo reports ismaster=True when server says false; connection handshake parsing bug, predates SDAM spec.
Request to include error code/string in assertion failure messages; error message ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
Cursor invalidated after OS hibernate/resume; operational edge case, no specific spec rule contradicted.
BSON spec defines Binary default subtype; code defaults to OLD_BINARY_SUBTYPE contradicting documented spec-aligned default.
Segfault serializing recursive data structure in C BSON module; memory safety bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Documentation gap for collection attribute access syntax; docs-only issue, no spec conformance involved.
Performance optimization using __slots__ on ObjectId class; internal memory optimization, no spec rule involved.
KeyError accessing 'value' in find_and_modify when no document matches; internal error handling bug.
Traceback when calling find() on system.js collection; internal API bug, no spec involvement.
as_class option lost when Cursor is cloned via __getitem__; internal state propagation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
save() returns [None] when manipulate=False; Python-specific API behavior bug, no spec rule involved.
network_timeout causes premature EAGAIN errors on large inserts; internal socket configuration bug, no spec rule contradicted.
ObjectId cannot be pickled due to __slots__ without __getstate__; Python serialization bug, no spec rule involved.
BSON spec requires int32/int64 type selection based on Python type; driver uses value range instead, losing long type fidelity.
Pickle format incompatibility between pymongo 1.9 and 1.10 ObjectId; internal backwards-compatibility bug, no spec involvement.
